title: Örebro Cold Snap
lead: Örebro is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.26. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Örebro are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The HDD value of 12.4 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 70% and wind speed of 5.8 km/h are also contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
